assertions.title: Config resolution is consistent across CLI and API-backed flows

steps.expected: Returns list of courses using config.json credentials
steps.observed: Returned 27 courses successfully, data matches config.json user
Returned 24 lectures in reverse order by seqNo
Returned same 24 lectures with matching seqNos and structure

assertions.title: CLI range selection and API job ranges refer to the same lecture slice

steps.expected: Uses reverseLectures() before slicing with 1-based indices
steps.observed: Code confirms: reverses lectures, then applies start/end (1-based)

steps.expected: Uses reverseLecturesHelper() before slicing with 1-based indices
steps.observed: Code confirms: calls reverseLecturesHelper(), uses 1-based startIndex/endIndex
Unit test exists and verifies same behavior for ranges 1-2, 1-5, 0-0, 3-4

assertions.title: View and audio options normalize consistently across config, CLI, API, and downloader

steps.observed: Test passed - normalizeViews() correctly maps aliases

steps.expected: Passes, confirming API normalizes views before passing to downloader
steps.observed: Test passed - mapViewsForDownloader() correctly maps aliases

steps.action: Verify config accepts both canonical and legacy view values
steps.expected: Config validation allows first, second, both, left, right
steps.observed: config.go:Validate() checks all 5 values as valid

steps.action: Verify downloader contract uses canonical values only

frictions.description: curl command failed with exit code 7 on localhost connections, but wget worked fine
frictions.resolution: Used wget instead of curl for API calls

frictions.description: Download command times out when run without --dry-run (not available), blocking live download test
frictions.resolution: Used code inspection and existing unit tests to verify range alignment instead of live download

summary: All 3 assertions passed. CLI and API share the same config resolution, use consistent 1-based range indexing with lecture reversal, and normalize view aliases consistently before passing to the downloader layer.
